title: Touhou - Totem to Extend Item (Windows)
description: Turns the totem of undying into the extend item from the Touhou Project series. (Windows Variant)
body:
This resource pack changes the Totem of Undying into the Extend item from the Touhou Project Series. Also affects the use sound.
Windows Version.

## PC-98 Version can be found here.
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/touhou-totem-to-extend-item-(pc-98)
## 


**Touhou Project belongs to Team Shanghai Alice.**

_**DO NOT UPLOAD ANYWHERE ELSE**_
